title: lolly's hitsound packs
description: Adds resource packs that change the hitsound nothing else really.
body:
An unserious soundpack for fun.

**HOW TO USE:**
Extract the zip and open the folder named "lolly's hitsound packs" that's where all the packs are. Just copy and paste the packs into your resourcepack folder.

CONTAINS:
- CS:GO headshot
- boing (named "ball")
- dodgeball hit sfx (named "ball 2")
- boom bam bap
- exp ding
- fart sound effect (named "fard")
- huh sound effect (named "hu")
- jet set radio spray sfx
- lankybox **(please for the love of god don't use this)**
- michael p **(LOUD)**
- nugget from max design pro
- peppino scream
- punching sfx
- skibidi toilet **(please don't use this one either)**
- sugarcoat
- vine boom
- vivziepop (If confused, here's the [reference](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rLjvRi3KJ3o))
- yippie kid
- cough
- "IS THAT THE GRIM REAPER" ([reference](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tsVKhnTVJhU))
- mango
- o- (yeah the name doesn't tell anything so... [reference](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/mPCf_H-6A88))
- orchestra hit
- FAHHHH

**NOTICE: I DO **NOT** OWN THESE SOUNDS, THEY ARE TAKEN FROM THE INTERNET ALL RIGHTS GO TO THEIR RESPECTIVE OWNERS
I am also not responsible for the damage to your ears.**
